findings: Camera detector published non-empty /line_points in 1/4 camera/perception bags; the working run was: manual_course_rerun_7.

3/4 camera/perception bags had non-empty line_pixels but zero /line_points: manual_course_rerun_5, camera_line_detection_rerun, camera_line_detection_rerun_2feet_stationary. In those runs /line_costmap stayed empty, so Nav2 could drive over visible tape.
Dominant camera line diagnostic reason: stamped TF unavailable (1228 messages).

Only 1/4 camera/perception bags include raw ZED RGB+depth image topics; missing raw ZED image data in: manual_course_rerun_5, camera_line_detection_rerun, camera_line_detection_rerun_2feet_stationary.

Selected manual/calibration bags contain zero Nav2 plan messages, so they cannot validate planner-vs-costmap clearance or path-through-line behavior; use an autonomous nav debug bag or a live sim run for that check.
in_place_yaw_ladder_1 commanded yaw up to 1.00 rad/s, but odom yaw changed only 0.022 deg; do not tune Gazebo yaw dynamics from this bag until the odom/encoder yaw path is explained.
straight_distance_drift_low_2 physical/odom forward ratio = 1.178; treat as odom-scale diagnostic, not lateral-bias tuning.

run_metadata.description: Forward arcs to calibrate effective turn radius, turn slowdown, and yaw response under translation.
run_metadata.operator_notes: Run in a large open area. Reposition manually between segments if needed by toggling AUTO off; the script will abort safely.

run_metadata.description: In-place yaw response for angular calibration.
run_metadata.operator_notes: Run on open flat asphalt with enough room for rotational drift.

run_metadata.description: Distance-gated straight-line drift test at 0.5 and 1 mph. Stops each segment from odometry distance and logs forward/lateral/heading drift.
run_metadata.operator_notes: Use a marked straight lane. Measure the physical start/end line if possible; command_metrics.csv will log odom forward distance, lateral drift, heading drift, and overshoot.

run_metadata.description: Record a broad full-course bag while the operator manually drives. The script does not command motion.
run_metadata.operator_notes: Manual drive the course naturally. Include slow and normal passes over lines, cones, and ramp.

run_metadata.description: Record a broad full-course bag while the operator manually drives. The script does not command motion.
run_metadata.operator_notes: Manual drive the course naturally. Include slow and normal passes over lines, cones, and ramp.

run_metadata.description: Record full perception data while the robot is stationary or manually crept through representative line/cone/ramp views.
run_metadata.operator_notes: Stationary or hand-crept views of tape, cones, ramp, shadows, legal gaps, and illegal narrow gaps.

run_metadata.description: Record full perception data while the robot is stationary or manually crept through representative line/cone/ramp views.
run_metadata.operator_notes: Stationary or hand-crept views of tape, cones, ramp, shadows, legal gaps, and illegal narrow gaps.
